mapper.sql: A.HPCM_ID AS hpcmId , A.HPCM_SE_CODE AS hpcmSeCode , A.HPCM_SE_CODE AS hpcmSeCodeNm , A.HPCM_DFN AS hpcmDf , A.HPCM_DC AS hpcmDc , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm

if.if: AND (A.HPCM_DFN LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}),'%') OR A.HPCM_DC LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}),'%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_HPCM_INFO A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.HPCM_ID DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_HPCM_INFO A WHERE 1=1
